userStories.title: Card - Smooth Flip Animation
userStories.description: Ensure a smooth 3D flip animation when reserving a card.
acceptanceCriteria: 1. Ensure a smooth 3D flip animation when reserving a card.
2. Add `perspective` to the container to enhance the 3D effect.

userStories.title: CardMarket - Slide-in Animation for new cards
userStories.description: Add a slide-in animation for new cards entering the market.
acceptanceCriteria: 1. Add a slide-in animation for new cards entering the market.
2. The animation should translate from `translateX(-20px)` to `0` and fade in.

userStories.description: Tone down saturation, add noise texture.

userStories.description: Use serif font for numbers on cards.

userStories.description: Mix environment color into backgrounds, blur.
